name: Red Velvet Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the frosting: In a separate bowl, mix 2 tablespoons all-purpose flour with 1 cup milk until smooth.
2. Add 1 cup Crisco and 1 cup oleo (shortening) to the milk mixture. Mix well until creamy.
3. Stir in 2 teaspoons vanilla extract.
4. Pour the buttermilk into the frosting and stir gently.
5. Combine baking soda and vinegar separately, then add to the batter while continuously stirring until foamy.
6. Add the dry ingredients (cake flour and salt) to the batter and mix well until smooth.
7. Divide the batter evenly among greased and floured round pans (2-3).
8. Bake in a preheated oven at 350°F for 35 minutes, or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
9. Allow the cakes to cool completely before frosting.
10. Frost the cooled cake layers with the prepared frosting and decorate as desired.
11. Store the cake refrigerated until serving.
